prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年新疆大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约14735名→22731名→13023名→15113名→22952名，整体波动剧烈，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约2 2952名，较2024年大幅后移约7839名，为近五年最低位次（最易考取）；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年12人、2022–2024年均为20人、2025年增至24人；2 026年计划大幅扩至32人，较2025年增加8人（增幅约33%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，使位次数字明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为211工程、双一流建 设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第131名（2025年第127名），近年排名略有下滑但仍属全国中上水平，在西北地区综合类高校中具有代表性；该校在声誉舆 情文件中未见明显正面或负面事件；抖音学校热度总排名第72位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等偏低，报考关注度相对平稳，未出现明显升温或降温信号；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力以B类为主，在211高校中处于中等偏后位置，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在海南招生 专业涉及法学（偏热）、汉语言文学（推荐）、软件工程/计算机类（推荐但近年降温）、自动化/电气类（高热推荐）、旅游管理/工商管理类（明显劝退）、生物科学/生化环材 （明显劝退）等，冷热分化明显；海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人（较2025年67408人增长约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧，近年基 本稳定在480–483分区间，未出现大幅波动；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐市，与海南省地理距离遥远，跨省就读意愿受地域偏好影响较大；该校在本省（新疆） 招生占比远高于外省，在海南招生规模较小（2026年32人），属于典型的"远距离低热度"招生模式，地域劣势对报考热度有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次 约22952名、2026年大幅扩招33%（使位次后移约4590名）、海南省考生总数增长约15.7%（竞争加剧）、学校声誉一般且抖音热度偏低、地域距离远等因素，再结合考生规模扩大带来的额外竞争压力微调，预测2026年最低录取位次约27742名，区间27242–28242名。扩招是位次后移的最主要驱动因素，考生总数增长和地域 偏好为次要影响因素。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（国家级一流本科专业；教育部卓越法律人才教育培养基地）
- 汉语言文学（国家级一流本科专业）
- 俄语（国家级一流本科专业；英语单科成绩不低于90分）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 国际经济与贸易（省级一流本科专业）
- 自动化（国家级一流本科专业）
- 旅游管理（国家级一流本科专业）
- 生物科学（国家级一流本科专业）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 交通工程（省级一流本科专业）
- 软件工程（国家级一流本科专业；数学单科不低于90分；含俄语言特色班）
- 资源勘查工程（省级一流本科专业）
- 遥感科学与技术
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约27742名，区间27242–28242名。位次在此区间内建议以二档为主力填报（自动化、国际经济与贸易），一档专业（法学、汉语言文学）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（ 软件工程、遥感科学与技术）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<27242名）时可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间下限（>28242名）时建议以三档专业为主。注意该校专业 冷热分化明显，自动化（电气类）和遥感科学与技术（电子信息类）社会热度高但位次要求相对较低，性价比突出。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xinjiang University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 14735 → 22731 → 13023 → 15113 → 22952, showing significant volatility with no clear unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 22952, a substantial drop of about 7839 places from 2024, marking the lowest ranking in the past five years (easiest to gain admission); the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 12 students in 2021, 20 students each year from 2022 to 2024, and increased to 24 students in 2025; the plan for 2026 expands significantly to 32 students, an increase of 8 students (about 33%) from 2025, a notable expansion that will directly lower the admission threshold, causing the ranking number to shift significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is approximately 131st in 2026 (127th in 2025), showing a slight decline in recent years but still in the upper-middle range nationally, representative among comprehensive universities in the Northwest region; no significant positive or negative events were found in the university's reputation and public opinion documents; the overall ranking of Douyin school popularity is 72nd, rated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure, indicating relatively stable application attention without obvious signs of heating up or cooling down; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, placing it in the middle to lower range among Project 211 universities, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The majors offered by the university in Hainan include Law (relatively popular), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), Software Engineering/Computer Science (recommended but cooling in recent years), Automation/Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), Tourism Management/Business Administration (clearly advised against), Biological Sciences/Biochemistry, Environmental Science, and Materials Science (clearly advised against), showing clear polarization between hot and cold majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hainan Province college entrance examination is about 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition, with the baseline score remaining stable in the 480–483 range in recent years without major fluctuations; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Hainan Province, and the willingness to study across provinces is greatly influenced by regional preferences; the university's enrollment proportion in its home province (Xinjiang) is much higher than in other provinces, with a small enrollment scale in Hainan (32 students in 2026), typical of a 'long-distance, low-heat' enrollment model, where geographical disadvantages have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of about 22952, the significant enrollment expansion of 33% in 2026 (causing the ranking to shift backward by about 4590 places), the increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province by about 15.7% (intensified competition), the average school reputation and low Douyin popularity, and the geographical distance, along with additional competitive pressure from the expanded candidate pool for fine-tuning, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 27742, with a range of 27242–28242. Enrollment expansion is the primary driver of the ranking shift backward, with the increase in total candidates and geographical preferences being secondary factors.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (National First-Class Undergraduate Program; Ministry of Education Excellent Legal Talent Education and Training Base)
- Chinese Language and Literature (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Russian (National First-Class Undergraduate Program; English single subject score not less than 90 points)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- International Economics and Trade (Provincial First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Automation (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Tourism Management (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Biological Sciences (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Traffic Engineering (Provincial First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Software Engineering (National First-Class Undergraduate Program; Mathematics single subject score not less than 90 points; includes Russian Language Feature Class)
- Resource Exploration Engineering (Provincial First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 27742, with a range of 27242–28242. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Automation, International Economics and Trade), with Tier 1 majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Software Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<27242) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; those with rankings near the lower limit of the range (>28242) are advised to primarily choose Tier 3 majors. Note the clear polarization between hot and cold majors at this university; Automation (Electrical Engineering) and Remote Sensing Science and Technology (Electronic Information) have high social popularity but relatively lower ranking requirements, offering outstanding cost-effectiveness.
